rulings.Case Title: WOLLBORG/MICHELSON PERSONNEL SERVICE INC VS. EXECUTIVE RISK INDEMNITY INC et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON MONDAY, MAY 14, 2007, LINE 4. PLAINTIFF WOLLBORG/MICHELSON PERSONNEL SERVICE, INC.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO RE-FILE THE MOTION. DEFENDANT'S REQUEST FOR A CONTINUANCE UNDER 437C(H) BECAUSE OF DISCOVERY ISSUES IS NOT WELL TAKEN. THERE IS A PROCESS TO ADDRESS DISCOVERY ISSUES AND THE PARTIES MUST AVAIL THEMSELVES OF THAT PROCESS. DEFENDANT'S OBJECTIONS TO DOWGIALO'S DECLARATION, PARAGRAPHS FIVE THROUGH 12 AND TO EXHIBITS 4, 5, 13 AND 15, ARE TECHNICALLY CORRECT BUT READILY ADDRESSED BY AN APPROPRIATE REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE AND/OR A DECLARATION THAT IS NOT BASED ON HEARSAY AND INCLUDES THE DOCUMENT, NOT JUST AN EXCERPT. THE OBJECTION TO EXHIBITS 1 AND 16 ARE OVERRULED. =(302/PJM/AP)
